metadata.title: FlowDockr Deal
metadata.description: Handle client discount pressure with structured negotiation replies and clear pricing boundaries.

hero.title: Handle price objections without dropping your value.
hero.description: FlowDockr Deal helps freelancers respond to discount requests with confidence, clarity, and a clear next step.

features.title: What Deal solves
features.description: Built for real client conversations where margin and positioning are at risk.

items.title: Client says it's too expensive
items.description: Generate responses that defend value before discussing concessions.

items.title: Competitor is cheaper
items.description: Reframe by outcomes, risk reduction, and delivery reliability.

items.title: Need to close with boundaries
items.description: Use conditional concessions tied to scope or timeline.

usage.label: Workflow
usage.title: Resolve the negotiation in 3 steps
usage.description: Simple structure for faster, more controlled deal outcomes.

items.title: Capture context
items.description: Record your quote, floor price, and the exact objection.

items.title: Generate response
items.description: Get instant reply options with clear negotiation logic.

items.title: Close next step
items.description: Ask for confirmation and move the deal forward.

cta.title: Negotiation pressure is normal. Improvised replies are optional.
cta.description: Use Scope and Payment modules together to protect both delivery and revenue.
